verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge failed to identify the location as Canada, despite the ground truth being Canada (Nova Scotia). The judge's reasoning relied on 'quintessential New England' heuristics (architecture, poles) which are also present in the Canadian Maritimes. The judge did not effectively weigh the evidence to distinguish between the US Northeast and Canadian Maritimes, resulting in an incorrect prediction.
